evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent checks if .graph-index.json exists and is fresh (mtime comparison). If stale or missing, runs graph_ops.py build first, then runs backlinks query. Never queries a stale index silently.

evaluations.prompt: Show me the semantic connections of 'MyNote'.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent returns semantic wikilinks only. Transclusion embeds (![[...]]) are filtered out by the parser and NOT counted as semantic connections.

evaluations.prompt: Find notes in my vault that have no incoming or outgoing links.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent runs graph_ops.py orphans --vault-root <path>. Reports each orphaned note as a potential blind spot. Does NOT delete or move them automatically.
